desc: Swaps one or more family instances to a target family/type.
summary: Swaps one or more family instances to a target family/type. Uses MCPFamilySwap.Swap for the actual swap logic. Uses MEPBridge.Revit.AIChat.Services.Execution.CommandExecutor to read AI parameters. Called by AI chat or the family_swap MCP tool. Related: MCPFamilySwap for the core swap engine.
usecase: User wants to swap a fitting or fixture to a different family. User wants to change the type of an existing family instance. AI needs to programmatically replace a family instance during a workflow.
notfor: Swapping MEP system types (use system type commands). Batch-swapping all instances of a family (use a batch command). Loading new families into the document (use a load family command).
precondition: Active document must be open. Target element must be a FamilyInstance. Target family must be loaded in the document.
postcondition: The specified family instance is swapped to the target family/type. Result JSON contains previous and new family/type info.

config_inputs.name: elementId
config_inputs.description: Element ID of the family instance to swap

config_inputs.name: typeName
config_inputs.description: Optional target type name within the family

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Swap result with previous/new family and type
